name: Strand Equity
notes: Consumer growth equity firm investing in consumer brands; HQ at 1888 Century Park E, Los Angeles, CA 90067.

name: TCV / Velocity Fund
notes: TCV (Technology Crossover Ventures) is headquartered in Menlo Park, CA. The Velocity Fund is TCV's early-stage strategy arm, not a separate entity.

name: Tenfore
notes: Full name is Tenfore Holdings. Global investment firm focused on growth-stage and middle-market tech-enabled companies. HQ at 41 E 11th St, New York, NY.

name: Twelve Below
notes: Pre-seed and seed-stage software VC founded in 2021 by Taylor Greene and Byron Ling. HQ at 104 5th Ave, New York, NY 10011.

name: Underscore
notes: Full name Underscore VC. B2B software/SaaS pre-seed and seed investor headquartered in Boston's Old City Hall, 45 School St, Boston, MA.

name: Untapped
notes: Likely Untapped Capital (untapped.vc). Operates remotely between Seattle, WA and San Francisco, CA — no single definitive HQ city; city/state left null. Could also be Untapped Ventures (untapped.ventures, LA-based) — name alone is ambiguous.

name: Valia Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC with offices in New York, San Francisco, and London. Primary HQ is New York.

name: Valiant Capital
notes: Valiant Capital Management / Valiant Capital Partners — San Francisco-based global long/short equity hedge fund founded by Christopher R. Hansen in 2008.

name: Vanterra Ventures
notes: Growth/expansion VC founded in 2018. HQ at 853 Broadway, Suite 1401, New York, NY 10003. Focuses on consumer tech, digital health, and enabling technologies.

name: Verbatim
notes: Likely Verbatim Labs — content studio/SaaS platform helping startups scale content marketing, headquartered in Brooklyn, NY. Distinct from legacy Verbatim Corporation (data storage). Name alone is ambiguous.

name: Vibe Bio
notes: Biotech company focused on rare disease drug development using a community/DAO model. Founded 2022, HQ in Boston, MA.

name: Vickers Ventures
notes: Full name Vickers Venture Partners. Headquartered in Singapore (1 Harbourfront Avenue) with offices in New York, Silicon Valley, London, and Shanghai. Not a US HQ firm.
